narrative:
Washington Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 829 registered voters, with 45.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 51.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 48.5 percentage points.
